title: chore(deps): update dependency webpack-dev-middleware to v2.0.6 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [webpack-dev-middleware](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-middleware) from `v2.0.1` to `v2.0.6`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v2.0.2`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-middleware/releases/v2.0.2)

#### Updates

- Implemented [`webpack-log`](https://github.com/webpack-contrib/webpack-log), removed dependencies related to the previous logging implementation.

---

</details>


<details>
<summary>Commits</summary>

#### v2.0.2
-   [`c25b883`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-middleware/commit/c25b88370691c76b5659b26e7c60b181e1ded1af) (sp) Update Readme (#​237)
-   [`0f9e063`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-middleware/commit/0f9e0635863add14db27fa7ab0392ec4d4b2a8ab) fixed name of logging lib and added link (#​238)
-   [`314216b`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-middleware/commit/314216bef640b28872fc9c94e1386ed2cace96c6) implementing webpack-log, cleaning up sinon sandboxes in tests
-   [`97a3c0f`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-middleware/commit/97a3c0f87fb9bd69cef3692ebffe7f51d4f7dcc5) 2.0.2

-   [`bb57ce6`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-middleware/commit/bb57ce6dd966a3a8f910da06d281c123df184634) 2.0.4
